title: ainsliaea latifolia subsp. henryi
intro: Ainsliaea latifolia subsp. henryi is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the broad-leaved ainsliaea. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ainsliaea latifolia subsp. henryi include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Ainsliaea latifolia subsp. henryi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
